creator: junchoon@dec.sakura.ne.jp
text:
(In reply to Ken DEGUCHI from comment #2)

Thanks for checking it.

I've looked into logs on current upstream and found that the offending "-DBATCH" already existed at the first import.
The former (original) upstream doesn't seem to have any revision control system and could not determine why it was introduced.

So it would be reasonable to going forward for now, and reconsider if any promlem happenes in the future.
